Toffee Squares

author: Jeanne Marrs

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 1 cup butter
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • 1 egg
  • 2 cups flour
  • 1 tsp. vanilla
  • 1 cup nuts
  • 8 oz. milk chocolate

Directions

  1. Cream butter and sugar. Add beaten egg. Add vanilla and flour.
  2. Bake at 350 deg. for 15-20 minutes in 10x15 pan.
  3. Spread with chocolate and nuts while warm.
